info.name: Smart Finance Tracker API
info.description:
Complete API collection for AI-Powered Smart Finance Tracker Backend.

**Setup:**
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Set the `baseUrl` variable to `http://localhost:5000/api/v1`
3. Register a user first → Login → Copy the token → Set `token` variable
4. All protected routes use the `token` variable automatically

**Variables used:**
- `baseUrl` → `http://localhost:5000/api/v1`
- `token`   → JWT token from login/register response
- `userId`, `accountId`, `transactionId`, `budgetId`, `categoryId`, `goalId`, `groupId`, `notificationId`, `receiptId` → Auto-set by tests

item.name: 🔐 Auth
item.description: User registration, login, logout, and profile.

item.name: 💳 Accounts (Wallets)
item.description: Manage bank accounts, cash wallets, credit cards, etc.

item.name: 💸 Transactions
item.description: Create and manage income, expense, and transfer transactions.

item.name: 📊 Budgets
item.description: Set and track spending budgets per category.

item.name: 🎯 Savings Goals
item.description: Create and track savings goals with deposit functionality.

item.name: 👥 Groups & Split Expenses
item.description: Create groups, add members, split and track shared expenses.

item.name: 📈 Reports & Analytics
item.description: Generate financial reports, export CSV, and get currency rates.

item.name: 🧾 Receipt Scanner
item.description: Upload receipt images and use AI OCR to extract data.

formdata.description: Select a receipt image (JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 5MB)

item.name: 🤖 AI Features
item.description: AI-powered categorization, insights, budget predictions, and chatbot.
